title: The Central Laws (Extension to Arunachal Pradesh) Act, 1993
full_text: The Central Laws (Extension to Arunachal Pradesh) Act, 1993 केन्‍द्रीय विधि (अरुणाचल प्रदेश परविस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199344 Act Number: 44 Enactment Date: 1993-05-27 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The Central Laws (Extension to Arunachal Pradesh) Act, 1993 Hindi Title: केन्‍द्रीय विधि (अरुणाचल प्रदेश परविस्‍तारण) अधिनियम, 1993 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of certain Central laws to the State of Arunachal Pradesh. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Legislative Department Enforcement Date: 01-07-1994 Notification: 1st July, 1994, vide notification No. S.O. 491(E), dated 1st July, 1994, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Central Laws (Extension to Arunachal Pradesh) Act, 1993 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Extension of certain laws. Section 3. Construction of references to laws not in force in Arunachal Pradesh. Section 4. Construction of references to authorities where new authorities have been constituted. Section 5. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1.
